title: 2024 NCAA Tournament: Akron vs Texas Tech Predictions, Picks, Odds, and Best Bets March 20
body:
The NCAA Tournament is heating up, and Friday's matchup between the 12th-seeded Akron Zips and the 5th-seeded Texas Tech Red Raiders promises to be an exciting one. The two teams will face off at 12:40 p.m. ET in Tampa, Florida, with the Red Raiders heavily favored to take the win. Texas Tech is looking to make a deep run in the tournament, while Akron is seeking to pull off a major upset.

The Red Raiders have been a force to be reckoned with this season, boasting a strong offense and stingy defense that has allowed them to secure a number one seed in the tournament. Led by head coach Chris Beard, Texas Tech has consistently demonstrated its ability to adapt to different game situations and opponents. The team's experience in the tournament will undoubtedly be an advantage, as they look to move on to the next round.

On the other hand, Akron has been a Cinderella story in the making. As a 12th-seeded team, they are considered a long shot to make it past the first round. However, the Zips have shown flashes of brilliance this season, thanks in part to their high-powered offense. Led by freshman point guard Daequan Moragne, who has been a key contributor to the team's success, Akron has the potential to cause an upset.

Despite being the underdogs, the Zips have a few factors working in their favor. For one, they have a strong home-court advantage, having played in the same region for much of the season. Additionally, Akron's offense has been particularly effective in the second half of games, which could bode well for them in a tournament setting where momentum can shift quickly. However, the Red Raiders' defense will undoubtedly pose a challenge, and Akron will need to be able to contain Texas Tech's high-scoring offense if they hope to pull off the upset.

The key to the game may lie in the Red Raiders' ability to contain Akron's Moragne. If Texas Tech can limit his production, they will likely be able to dictate the pace of the game and limit Akron's chances of scoring. On the other hand, if Moragne is able to get hot, the Zips will have a much better chance of keeping the game close and potentially forcing overtime.

As the NCAA Tournament continues to unfold, Friday's matchup between Akron and Texas Tech will be one to watch. While the Red Raiders are heavily favored, the Zips have shown that they are not to be underestimated. Ultimately, the outcome of this game will depend on which team is able to adapt best to the other's strengths and weaknesses. One thing is certain, however: this game will be an exciting one to watch, with plenty of twists and turns to keep fans on the edge of their seats.
